items.title: LeBron James' Free Agency Coincides With World Cup For Fourth Time In Career
items.originalTitle: LeBron James' Free Agency Coincides With World Cup For Fourth Time In Career
items.headlineZh: LeBron James' Free 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: LeBron James' Free 签约动向更新
items.summary:
Each of LeBron James' four times changing teams during his NBA career has coincided with a World Cup including this offseason.

In 2010, James announced his decision live on ESPN to leave the Cleveland Cavaliers for the Miami Heat on July 8th, which was three days before Spain defeated the Netherlands on July 11th in the World Cup Final.

In 2014, James announced his decision to return to the Cavaliers via Sports Illustrated two days before Germany defeated Argentina in the World Cup Final. James attended the match held in Brazil.

But in 2018, James almost immediately announced his decision to sign with the Los Angeles Lakers at the start of free agency on July 1st. France defeated Croatia in the World Cup final 14 days later on July 15th.

Spain will play Argentina in the World Cup Final on Sunday, July 19th in New York.

James is reportedly considering the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat, Philadelphia 76ers, Golden State Warriors and Minnesota Timberwolves. James offered no tangible insights into which team he may be leaning towards in free agency during an interview with Tyrese Haliburton on Thursday.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，LeBron James' Free 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。

items.title: NBA Examining Bucks' Four-Year, $64M Deal With Gary Trent Jr.
items.originalTitle: NBA Examining Bucks' Four-Year, $64M Deal With Gary Trent Jr.
items.headlineZh: Examining 雄鹿' 四年签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Examining 雄鹿' 四年签约动向更新
items.summary:
The NBA has confirmed they are "continuing to look into" the four-year, $64 million contract Gary Trent Jr. signed with the Milwaukee Bucks this offseason. Trent's deal follows two successive seasons playing for the Bucks at the veteran's minimum. The Bucks were able to offer Trent a raise after gaining his early Bird rights.

Trent averaged 8.1 points on 36.0 percent three-point shooting across 65 games last season.

Multiple NBA reporters have indicated that they had heard for weeks Trent was in line for a substantial pay raise in re-signing with the Bucks as a free agent.

ESPN's Shams Charania has indicated that Trent received interest from at least one other team on a sign-and-trade scenario.

Trent is represented by Rich Paul and Lucas Newton.
items.oneLineZh: Examining 雄鹿' 四年签约动向更新
items.displayTitle: NBA Examining Bucks' Four-Year, $64M Deal With Gary Trent Jr.

items.title: Lakers Interested In Matisse Thybulle
items.originalTitle: Lakers Interested In Matisse Thybulle
items.headlineZh: Interested 在 Matisse 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Interested 在 Matisse 相关消息更新
items.summary:
The Los Angeles Lakers have interest in signing free agent win Matisse Thybulle, sources tell Marc Stein. Thybulle is coming off his three-year, $33 million contract with the Portland Trail Blazers that was originally signed as a restricted free agent offer sheet with the Dallas Mavericks in 2023 that was matched. Luka Doncic was with the Mavericks when Thybulle signed the offer sheet.

Thybulle appeared in 30 games last season with the Blazers, averaging 5.8 points, 2.0 rebounds and 2.0 steals as one of the NBA's best wing defenders.

Thybulle missed most of the 2024-25 season due to right knee tendinopathy.

The Lakers also signed Ziaire Williams this week and remain in pursuit of Jonathan Kuminga as they build out their wing depth.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，湖人 Interested 在 Matisse Thybulle，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Interested 在 Matisse 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Lakers Interested In Matisse Thybulle

items.title: Bam Adebayo Won't Receive Punishment From NBA For Punching Tyler Herro
items.originalTitle: Bam Adebayo Won't Receive Punishment From NBA For Punching Tyler Herro
items.headlineZh: Bam Adebayo Won't 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Bam Adebayo Won't 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Bam Adebayo will not receive punishment from the NBA for punching former Miami Heat teammate Tyler Herro at a Las Vegas hotel and gym last week, a league spokesperson told The Athletic. The decision followed discussions between the league, both players and the NBPA.

"After discussing with the players involved and the NBPA, everyone would prefer to move on from this unfortunate circumstance, and no further action will be taken by the league," said the spokesperson.

The Milwaukee Bucks, the Heat and the NBPA all declined to comment on the league's decision. The altercation occurred Friday while Herro's AAU team practiced inside Resorts World Las Vegas hotel. Herro appeared to yell something at Adebayo, who approached him before throwing a punch. Players and coaches quickly separated the two before Adebayo left the hotel.

Adebayo and Herro spent seven seasons together in Miami before Herro was traded to Milwaukee as part of the package the Bucks sent to acquire two-time NBA MVP Giannis Antetokounmpo. Following the trade, screenshots purportedly showing direct messages from an Instagram account connected to Herro circulated online, appearing to question Adebayo's game and whether his contracts with the Heat were justified.
items.oneLineZh: Bam Adebayo Won't 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Bam Adebayo Won't Receive Punishment From NBA For Punching Tyler Herro

Mouhamed Gueye underwent surgery on his fractured left foot, the Atlanta Hawks announced on Wednesday.

Gueye suffered the injury during a workout.

Gueye's status will be updated in three to four months, putting him in danger of missing the start of next season.

Gueye averaged 4.4 points and 3.6 rebounds for the Hawks last season.

items.title: Tim Connelly: LaMelo Ball, Wolves Can 'Elevate' Each Other
items.originalTitle: Tim Connelly: LaMelo Ball, Wolves Can 'Elevate' Each Other
items.headlineZh: Tim Connelly 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Tim Connelly 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Tim Connelly and the Minnesota Timberwolves made a high risk, high reward trade for LaMelo Ball, which he explained during an interdictory press conference this week. The Wolves targeted a ball handler in the offseason to alleviate pressure off Anthony Edwards, who was heavily double teamed last season.

"He's a lead guard, he's a real point guard, which is hard to find," Connelly said. "I think you see the impact that he has on his teammates, and I think it's probably well-timed. He's been through a lot. But he's still only 24 years old. He's a guy that we think is going to help elevate us, and hopefully we can help elevate him as well."

Ball was Rookie of the Year with the Charlotte Hornets in 2021 and an All-Star in his second season. After a few injury-plagued seasons, Ball helped lead the Hornets back to the play-in.

"I feel like it's God's plan," Ball said on Tuesday. "I just leave it up to Him, and I just feel extremely blessed."

The Wolves believe Ball will have a compounding effect on their team.

"The way he plays is so much innate feel and connectivity and just ... kind of fun to watch in a lot of ways," Chris Finch said. "And a lot of things he does, you can't really teach or coach."
items.oneLineZh: Tim Connelly 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Tim Connelly: LaMelo Ball, Wolves Can 'Elevate' Each Other

items.title: Steve Ballmer Interviewed Again By Wachtell As Investigation Reaches Final Stages
items.originalTitle: Steve Ballmer Interviewed Again By Wachtell As Investigation Reaches Final Stages
items.headlineZh: Steve Ballmer Interviewed 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Steve Ballmer Interviewed 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Steve Ballmer met with Wachtell lawyers last week as its investigation into Aspiration reaches its final stages. Ballmer had previously sat for an interview with the lawyers conducting the NBA's investigation into the matter.

Ballmer, who invested $60 million in Aspiration, has denied he had knowledge of Kawhi Leonard's endorsement deal with the company central to the inquiry.

A trade sending Kawhi Leonard from the Los Angeles Clippers to the Toronto Raptors is on hold until the findings and any possible punishments to Leonard are reached.

The Raptors said in a statement that they "remain eager to bring Kawhi back to Toronto" but will wait until the investigation is over to proceed.

Leonard could have his contract voided or be fined up to $350,000 depending on the findings.

"The league did not pause the trade," Adam Silver said Tuesday. "The parties to the trade made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open. Any possible impact on Kawhi or his contract was yet to be known. They chose not to live with that uncertainty. That was well known before the trade was proposed.

"I don't think there's any reason for people to believe that the status of Kawhi Leonard would change merely because he was traded."

A source tells ESPN that the NBA didn't communicate with the Clippers in advance because guidance from the league office was never requested.

"Questions were asked [by teams interested in acquiring Leonard] and answered quickly by the league office," Silver said. "I don't think any of this information should have been a surprise to anyone involved who thought about trading for him or were part of those discussions."

The NBA had a similar situation ahead of the trade deadline with whether teams would be allowed to trade for Terry Rozier pending his federal arrest on a gambling probe.
items.summaryZh: RealGM 分析了 Steve Ballmer Interviewed Again By Wachtell As Investigation Reaches Final Stages，这是一篇观点或数据分析文章，并非球队官方决定。
items.oneLineZh: Steve Ballmer Interviewed 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Steve Ballmer Interviewed Again By Wachtell As Investigation Reaches Final Stages

items.title: Adam Silver To Hold NBA Europe Talks Amid World Cup Final In New York
items.originalTitle: Adam Silver To Hold NBA Europe Talks Amid World Cup Final In New York
items.headlineZh: Adam Silver To 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Adam Silver To 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Adam Silver said he is pleased with the current progress of negotiations with prospective clubs to join NBA Europe, which is slated to begin for the 2027-28 season. Silver said he and Mark Tatum will meet with stakeholders in New York this week since many will already be in town ahead of the World Cup final to be played on July 19 at MetLife Stadium.

"In terms of NBA Europe, yes, things are where I hoped they would be," said Silver on Tuesday after the Board of Governors meeting in Las Vegas. "Mark Tatum is overseeing the process. We've had tremendous interest from multiple cities in Europe, including cities that we didn't even ask for bids from.

"We discussed with our board today that we're in the process of finalizing those bids, I think for an initial group of cities. Many of the people who are involved in those bids, the European bidders, are actually going to be in New York for the World Cup final on Sunday.

"Mark and I are going to be attending several meetings with them, given their presence in New York. I would say we're hoping to wrap up some of those deals over the next several weeks, and then announcements will be forthcoming.

"But I'm very pleased with the interest across the board throughout Europe in basketball."

It was previously reported that the NBA has received numerous offers ranging from $500 million to more than $1 billion across each of its 12 target cities.

No club will receive an NBA Europe license without paying the league's entry fee. Beyond its 12 permanent members, the league plans to add four teams annually based on performance in domestic leagues and FIBA tournaments.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Adam Silver To Hold NBA Europe Talks Amid World Cup Final 在 New York，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Adam Silver To 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Adam Silver To Hold NBA Europe Talks Amid World Cup Final In New York

items.title: Adam Silver: Kawhi Leonard Investigation Will Be Completed By Start Of Next Season
items.originalTitle: Adam Silver: Kawhi Leonard Investigation Will Be Completed By Start Of Next Season
items.headlineZh: Adam Silver 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Adam Silver 相关消息更新
items.summary:
The NBA's investigation into Kawhi Leonard and the Los Angeles Clippers for alleged salary cap circumvention will conclude before the start of next season, according to commissioner Adam Silver.

"This [investigation] needs to be wrapped up before the beginning of next season," Silver said on Tuesday. "It's going on longer than I would have hoped, there's no question about that."

It was also reported earlier Tuesday that the investigation expanded into a potential unreported endorsement with a second company.

Silver attributed the length of the ongoing investigation to legal complications, including dealing with bankruptcy courts.

Silver then added that the league did not interfere with the potential trade between the Clippers and Raptors that included Leonard.

"The league did not pause the trade," Silver said. "The parties to the trade made a decision not to go forward given that the investigation remained open. Any possible impact on Kawhi or his contract was yet to be known. They chose not to live with that uncertainty. That was well known before the trade was proposed.

"I don't think there's any reason for people to believe that the status of Kawhi Leonard would change merely because he was traded."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Adam Silver: Kawhi Leonard Investigation Will Be Completed By Start Of Next Season，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Adam Silver 相关消息更新

items.title: Bronny James Could Remain With Lakers Next Season
items.originalTitle: Bronny James Could Remain With Lakers Next Season
items.headlineZh: Bronny James Could 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Bronny James Could 相关消息更新
items.summary:
The future of Bronny James could be with the Los Angeles Lakers despite the exit of his father, LeBorn James, from the franchise this offseason. There has been some speculation that Bronny could eventually be traded to whatever team LeBron signs with in free agency, but sources tell The Athletic that those assumptions are false.

The Lakers guaranteed Bronny's $2.3 million salary in June before the start of free agency.

Bronny is well-liked by his Lakers' teammates and has earned respect for his work in improving over his first two seasons with the franchise. Bronny attended the Lakers' Summer League game on Saturday and is participating in their veteran minicamp that began on Monday.

While Bronny spent most of his rookie season in the G League, he appeared in 42 games with the Lakers and averaged 2.9 points and 1.2 assists while shooting 38.6 percent on three-pointers.

"It's the best feeling in the world," Bronny said of playing in the playoffs. "I mean, in college, I didn't get to play in March, so that's something that's gonna irk me for the rest of my life. And I got to do it in the playoffs, and that's just the best feeling."

If Bronny does stay with the Lakers next season, he will compete for rotation minutes in the backcourt alongside Collin Sexton, rookie Cameron Carr and Jaden Hardy.

LeBron is deciding between the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat, Philadelphia 76ers, Golden State Warriors and Minnesota Timberwolves.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Bronny James Could Remain With 湖人 Next Season，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Bronny James Could 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Bronny James Could Remain With Lakers Next Season

items.title: Micky Arison Elected Chairman Of NBA Board Of Governors
items.originalTitle: Micky Arison Elected Chairman Of NBA Board Of Governors
items.headlineZh: Micky Arison Elected 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Micky Arison Elected 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Miami Heat Governor Micky Arison has been unanimously elected as the next Chairman of the NBA Board of Governors. Arison will assume the position following the league's Board of Governors meeting in September 2026.

Arison, who has the second-longest tenure of any current NBA team governor at 31 years, will succeed Toronto Raptors Governor Larry Tanenbaum, who has served as Chairman of the NBA Board of Governors since September 2017.

"I am grateful for Larry's nearly three decades of stewardship of the Raptors and his commitment to helping guide our league as NBA Board Chairman over the past nine years," said Silver. "Micky's long record of service on the Board, his strong relationships with his fellow team owners and his deep understanding of our game and business make him an exceptional choice to assume this important leadership role."

"The opportunity to serve as Chairman of the NBA Board of Governors for nearly a decade has been a tremendous honour," said Tanenbaum. "I am thankful to all the team owners and the league office for their collaborative spirit in growing the game on a global basis and I wish Micky great success in his new role as Chairman."

"I look forward to working closely in this new capacity with Adam, the league office and my fellow team governors to champion our teams and players, ensuring we continue to deliver exciting and unforgettable experiences for our fans," said Arison.

Under Arison's leadership, the Heat has won three NBA championships and made seven NBA Finals appearances. Arison was inducted into the Naismith Basketball Hall of Fame in 2025. Arison is also the long-time Chair of the Board of Directors of Carnival Corporation, the world's largest global cruise company.
items.oneLineZh: Micky Arison Elected 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Micky Arison Elected Chairman Of NBA Board Of Governors

items.title: Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid, Jaylen Brown Communicating With LeBron James
items.originalTitle: Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid, Jaylen Brown Communicating With LeBron James
items.headlineZh: Tyrese Maxey 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Tyrese Maxey 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid and Jaylen Brown have all been communicating with LeBron James as the Philadelphia 76ers continue pursuing the 41-year-old free agent.

Maxey is also represented by Rich Paul and has trained alongside James during previous offseasons, previously referring to the future Hall of Famer as a "big brother." Embiid won a gold medal with James on Team USA at the 2024 Paris Olympics.

Brown, who battled James in playoff series while playing for the Boston Celtics against James' Cleveland Cavaliers teams, received a public MVP endorsement from James in February.

"He's playing great basketball, man," James said at the time. "This whole MVP thing, I don't understand why his name is not getting talked about some, as well. Like, nobody gave them a shot to start the season."

James has also spoken favorably about Philadelphia's fan base in the past, including after a December game in which he scored 12 of his 29 points in the fourth quarter to lead the Los Angeles Lakers past the 76ers.

"One thing you know about Philly fans, they don't care about anybody besides their home teams, and I respect and I love that," said James. "I've played here, for obviously 23 years, a lot more when I was in Eastern Conference. But to be able to have an appreciation for the City of Brotherly Love and for me to go out and still play the game that I love and them respect it, whatever the case may be, if they do, it's pretty cool."

Sources told ESPN's Shams Charania that Philadelphia remains one of James' top potential destinations, alongside the Cavaliers and Miami Heat. Bob Myers, president of Harris Blitzer Sports and Entertainment, made Philadelphia's case directly during a recent appearance on the "Game Over" podcast hosted by Rich Paul, James' agent.

"If he was here, I'd say, 'I honestly believe this is your best chance to win. You have to decide all the other things that are equally important,'" said Myers. "What I would just say is, if it's about winning, let's talk about this team. Because you can win here in Philadelphia."

76ers president of basketball operations Mike Gansey, who previously worked with the Cavaliers during James' second stint with Cleveland, echoed that sentiment Monday.

"We've had conversations with Rich, really, since the Jaylen trade," said Gansey. "LeBron and his camp have kept quiet, and there has been speculation for different teams. But we'd obviously love to have LeBron. I respect the heck out of him. In my opinion, he's the best player of all time."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Tyrese Maxey，Joel Embiid，Jaylen Brown Communicating With LeBron James，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Tyrese Maxey 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid, Jaylen Brown Communicating With LeBron James

items.title: Pelicans Gave DeAndre Jordan Two-Year Deal Due To Competition From Another Team On One-Year Pact
items.originalTitle: Pelicans Gave DeAndre Jordan Two-Year Deal Due To Competition From Another Team On One-Year Pact
items.headlineZh: 鹈鹕 Gave DeAndre 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: 鹈鹕 Gave DeAndre 签约动向更新
items.summary:
The New Orleans Pelicans re-signed DeAndre Jordan on a two-year contract for the veteran's minimum, which eliminates the cap relief that comes from the NBA when signing the same contract for just one year.

The Pelicans wanted to retain Jordan next season and were convinced that he was prepared to accept a one-year deal from another team. Jordan has developed a reputation as one of the NBA's best veterans in the locker room to help guide younger players.

Jordan's contract was initially reported as a one-year deal.

Jordan only appeared in 12 games last season with the Pelicans after spending the previous three with the Denver Nuggets.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，鹈鹕 Gave DeAndre 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。

items.displayTitle: Pelicans Gave DeAndre Jordan Two-Year Deal Due To Competition From Another Team On One-Year Pact

items.title: NBA Summer League History: Stats For First Overall Picks
items.originalTitle: NBA Summer League History: Stats For First Overall Picks
items.headlineZh: Summer League History 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Summer League History 相关消息更新
items.summary:
AJ Dybantsa has been shut down from the 2026 NBA Summer League after appearing in two games with the Washington Wizards. Dybantsa scored 27 points to go with seven rebounds, two assists and two steals in the first game and then 23 points with seven rebounds, two assists, three steals and two blocks in the second game. Dybantsa's PER of 32.4 is the highest of any first overall pick in record.

The following list shows the PER and per game averages for every first overall pick dating back to Andrea Bargnani in 2006.

NBA First Overall Picks in Summer League
2006: Andrea Bargnani, 13.0 PER (13.2 PPG, 3.8 RPG, 1.0 BPG)
2007: Greg Oden, 13.0 PER (13.0 PPG, 5.0 RPG, 4.0 BPG)
2008: Derrick Rose, 13.3 PER (9.5 PPG, 4.0 RPG, 5.5 APG, 2.0 SPG)
2009: Blake Griffin, 19.3 PER (19.2 PPG, 10.8 RPG, 3.2 APG, 1.0 SPG)
2010: John Wall, 31.6 PER (23.5 PPG, 4.0 RPG, 7.8 APG, 2.5 SPG)
2011: Kyrie Irving (no Summer League due to lockout)
2012: Anthony Davis (didn't participate in Summer League due to Olympics)
2013: Anthony Bennett, 12.5 PER (13.2 PPG, 7.8 RPG; after rookie season due to injury in 2013)
2014: Andrew Wiggins, 18.0 PER (15.5 PPG, 3.5 RPG, 1.2 SPG, 1.5 BPG)
2015: Karl-Anthony Towns, 13.7 PER (12.8 PPG, 7.2 RPG, 2.0 APG, 1.8 BPG)
2016: Ben Simmons, 13.5 PER (10.8 PPG, 7.7 RPG, 5.5 APG, 1.0 SPG)
2017: Markelle Fultz, 16.0 PER (16.0 PPG, 3.0 RPG, 2.3 APG, 1.0 BPG)
2018: Deandre Ayton, 22.4 PER (14.5 PPG, 10.5 RPG, 1.0 SPG, 1.0 BPG)
2019: Zion Williamson (part of one Summer League game due to earthquake)
2020: Anthony Edwards (no Summer League due to COVID-19 pandemic)
2021: Cade Cunningham, 19.6 PER (3 games, 18.7 PPG, 5.7 RPG, 2.3 APG, 1.7 SPG, 1.3 BPG)
2022: Paolo Banchero, 23.9 PER (2 games, 20.0 PPG, 5.0 RPG, 6.0 APG, 2.5 SPG, 1.0 BPG)
2023: Victor Wembanyama, 22.9 PER (2 games, 18.0 PPG, 10.0 RPG, 1.5 APG, 4.0 BPG)
2024: Zaccharie Risacher, 12.8 PER (2 games, 14.5 PPG, 5.0 RPG, 2.0 APG)
2025: Cooper Flagg, 18.5 PER (2 games, 20.5 PPG, 5.0 RPG, 2.5 APG, 1.5 SPG)
2026: AJ Dybantsa, 32.4 PER (2 games, 25.0 PPG, 7.0 RPG, 2.0 APG, 2.5 SPG, 1.5 BPG)
items.oneLineZh: Summer League History 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: NBA Summer League History: Stats For First Overall Picks

items.title: AJ Dybantsa Shut Down For Rest Of Summer League By Wizards
items.originalTitle: AJ Dybantsa Shut Down For Rest Of Summer League By Wizards
items.headlineZh: AJ Dybantsa Shut 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: AJ Dybantsa Shut 相关消息更新
items.summary:
AJ Dybantsa has been shut down for the remainder of Summer League after appearing in two games.

Dybantsa scored 27 points in the first game and then 23 points in the second on Sunday.

Dybantsa finishes with averages of 25.0 points, 7.0 rebounds, 2.0 assists, 2.5 steals and 1.5 blocks in 25.4 minutes over the two Summer League games. Dybantsa had a PER of 32.4, which is the highest Summer League PER for a first overall pick on record.

"It was kind of just testing grounds for me," Dybantsa told ESPN after what ended up being his final summer league game on Sunday. "Just trying to get used to the game speed, to the plays, to the players and my teammates and the physicality of the game."

The Washington Wizards play again on Wednesday before the summer league playoffs begin.
items.oneLineZh: AJ Dybantsa Shut 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: AJ Dybantsa Shut Down For Rest Of Summer League By Wizards

items.title: NBA Investigation Into Kawhi Leonard Expands With Potential 2nd Undisclosed Endorsement Deal
items.originalTitle: NBA Investigation Into Kawhi Leonard Expands With Potential 2nd Undisclosed Endorsement Deal
items.headlineZh: Investigation Into Kawhi 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Investigation Into Kawhi 签约动向更新
items.summary:
The investigation into Kawhi Leonard and the Los Angeles Clippers has expanded in scope. Not only has Wachtell Lipton investigated whether there was a possible cap circumvention through a sponsorship deal with Aspiration, but also the possibility of improperly covered expenses by the Clippers for Leonard and a previously unreported endorsement deal with another company.

The Clippers agreed to trade Leonard to the Toronto Raptors in June, but that deal is on hold until the NBA's investigation is complete.

Steve Ballmer and the Clippers have denied any wrongdoing.

"We don't think that there's a 'there' there," National Basketball Players Association executive director David Kelly said. "It should not take this long in order for something to get wrapped up."

Leonard had an endorsement contract with Aspiration worth $28 million until the company ran into financial issues. Former Aspiration employees that have spoken with The Athletic still do not know definitively whether the deal was intended to bypass the salary cap.

The deal with the Clippers and a relationship with Ballmer was driven by co-founder Joe Sanberg.

Leonard and his uncle, Dennis Robertson, have been interviewed by the Watchtell lawyers.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Investigation Into Kawhi 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Investigation Into Kawhi 签约动向更新
items.displayTitle: NBA Investigation Into Kawhi Leonard Expands With Potential 2nd Undisclosed Endorsement Deal

items.title: Mark Daigneault, JB Bickerstaff, Mark Few To Join USA Basketball As Assistant Coaches
items.originalTitle: Mark Daigneault, JB Bickerstaff, Mark Few To Join USA Basketball As Assistant Coaches
items.headlineZh: Mark Daigneault 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Mark Daigneault 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Oklahoma City Thunder head coach Mark Daigneault, Detroit Pistons head coach JB Bickerstaff and Gonzaga head coach Mark Few will be named assistant coaches by USA Basketball under head coach Erik Spoelstra.

Spoelstra replaced Steve Kerr as head coach last September.

Few has served in various capacities in USA Basketball over the past decade, while Daigneault and Bickerstaff will be new to the program.

Daigneault led the Thunder to the 2025 NBA championship and the No. 1 seed in the regular season in the Western Conference in each of the past three seasons.

Bickerstaff helped lead Detroit's turnaround back to the playoffs in 2025 and the No. 1 seed in the Eastern Conference this past season.

Team USA has World Cup qualifiers in late August ahead of the 2027 World Cup in Qatar.

Team USA doesn't need to go through qualifiers for the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles as the host county.
items.oneLineZh: Mark Daigneault 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Mark Daigneault, JB Bickerstaff, Mark Few To Join USA Basketball As Assistant Coaches

items.title: Tyler Herro Focused On Bucks After Bam Adebayo Altercation
items.originalTitle: Tyler Herro Focused On Bucks After Bam Adebayo Altercation
items.headlineZh: Tyler Herro Focused 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Tyler Herro Focused 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Tyler Herro said he wants to move past his physical altercation with former teammate Bam Adebayo, telling ESPN he is focused on moving forward with the Milwaukee Bucks. The incident occurred last week in Las Vegas.

"Honestly, I'm just trying to move past all of it," said Herro. "I'm focused on Milwaukee and building something special. They obviously just traded the greatest player in their history, so we want to come in and help continue what they've been doing."

Herro added that Milwaukee, his hometown team, represents the one destination he would have welcomed outside of Miami.

"I'm ready to come home and not prove everyone wrong, but just be able to represent the city and the state because I wanted to do that coming out of school as well," said Herro.

ESPN's Shams Charania first reported that Herro and Adebayo were involved in a physical altercation at the Resorts World Hotel in Las Vegas on July 10. The incident began after Adebayo approached Herro around 9 a.m. local time, following a Heat training session held on the same court where Herro had worked out earlier that morning with his AAU team.

Sources with knowledge of the encounter said Adebayo confronted Herro over social media comments he had made critiquing the center following the end of their seven-year run as teammates in Miami. Herro responded in a way that Adebayo took exception to, and the confrontation turned physical.

Sources told ESPN that Adebayo struck Herro near the chin, though the exact nature of the contact remains disputed. Herro was not knocked to the ground and was restrained by others in the gym before any further physical response occurred.

The dispute stemmed partly from comments attributed to a social media account associated with Herro questioning whether Adebayo's $60 million salary was justified and suggesting Herro himself needed more support from his supporting cast while dealing with injuries. Adebayo had made similar comments earlier this season about needing more help from his own teammates following Miami's play-in elimination.

Heat sources said the relationship between Adebayo and Herro had grown strained over the past year as Herro appeared in just 33 games due to injury and adjusted to changes in Miami's offensive system. Adebayo had previously suggested publicly that Herro needed to adapt to the new scheme.

"It's all love in Miami," said Herro, when asked about seeing his former team. "I've seen a couple of the guys, coaching staff, Chris Quinn, Spo [Erik Spoelstra], the front office guys; we are all good in Miami. Just an opportunity for both sides to reset, get a fresh start, and both are super happy with this."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Tyler Herro Focused On 雄鹿 After Bam Adebayo Altercation，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Tyler Herro Focused 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Tyler Herro Focused On Bucks After Bam Adebayo Altercation

items.title: Bucks Interested In Peyton Watson
items.originalTitle: Bucks Interested In Peyton Watson
items.headlineZh: 雄鹿 Interested 在相关消息更新
items.titleZh: 雄鹿 Interested 在相关消息更新
items.summary:
The Milwaukee Bucks are interested in a sign-and-trade for Peyton Watson, sources told Marc Stein of The Stein Line.

Watson is currently a restricted free agent with the Nuggets.

The Nuggets have said that they plan to match any offer sheet for Watson, but are also open to a sign-and-trade deal.

The Clippers and Hawks have also registered interest in Watson.

items.titleZh: Trevon Brazile 与掘金达成四年，930 万美元合同
items.summary:
The Denver Nuggets signed Trevon Brazile to a four-year, $9.3 million contract, sources told Michael Scotto of HoopsHype.

The first two years of the deal are fully guaranteed.

Brazile was selected with the 35th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft by the Spurs before getting acquired by the Nuggets.

items.title: Trey Alexander Stretchered Off Court During Summer League Game
items.originalTitle: Trey Alexander Stretchered Off Court During Summer League Game
items.headlineZh: Trey Alexander Stretchered 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Trey Alexander Stretchered 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Utah Jazz guard Trey Alexander was stretchered off the court during a Summer League game against the Chicago Bulls on Monday night.

Alexander, who signed a two-way deal with the Jazz last week, clutched his side after colliding with Caleb Wilson on a drive.

Alexander was then taken off the court on a stretcher.

The Jazz had no update on Alexander's condition after the game.

items.title: Klay Thompson Emerges As Target For Heat
items.originalTitle: Klay Thompson Emerges As Target For Heat
items.headlineZh: Klay Thompson Emerges 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Klay Thompson Emerges 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Klay Thompson has emerged as a player of strong interest for the Miami Heat, multiple sources told the Miami Herald. The Heat's interest in Thompson exists regardless of whether LeBron James ultimately signs with the team.

Thompson would address Miami's need for shooting and size on the wing. The larger question is whether the Dallas Mavericks would move him via trade or buyout.

Dallas currently sits well below the luxury tax line and has little financial incentive to part with Thompson unless he agrees to a significant pay reduction in a buyout scenario. Thompson is owed $17.5 million in the final year of his three-year contract signed in 2024.

NBA insider Marc Stein reported last week that Dallas prefers exploring trade options over a buyout.

"To this point as much has been relayed to me is the Mavs preference would be a trade," said Stein. "I think it's still early enough in the summer that if you're the Mavs you would exhaust those options first."

A trade would likely require Miami to attach Nikola Jovic's contract in any deal, though it remains unclear whether Dallas has interest in absorbing his four-year, $62 million extension. If Thompson pursues a buyout instead, he could offset a pay cut by accepting a portion of Miami's $7 million midlevel exception, assuming that money isn't allocated to James.

Thompson averaged 11.7 points last season while shooting 39.3 percent from the field and 38.3 percent on 7.6 three-point attempts per game across 69 appearances for Dallas.

The Heat are looking to add a scoring wing with size to complement Andrew Wiggins, Tim Hardaway Jr., rookie Ryan Conwell and Pelle Larsson. Miami has held preliminary talks with representatives for free agent Bradley Beal but has not pursued him aggressively.

Miami remains in a holding pattern with free agent wing Demar DeRozan, who could become a stronger target if James signs elsewhere. Free agent guard Russell Westbrook has also been mentioned as a fallback option if James bypasses the Heat, according to the New York Post's Stefan Bondy, though Miami has not pursued him with urgency.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Klay Thompson Emerges As Target For 热火，目前仍属于消息或传闻阶段。
items.oneLineZh: Klay Thompson Emerges 相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Klay Thompson Emerges As Target For Heat

items.title: Jordan McLaughlin, Spurs Agree To One-Year, $3.3M Deal
items.originalTitle: Jordan McLaughlin, Spurs Agree To One-Year, $3.3M Deal
items.headlineZh: Jordan McLaughlin 与马刺达成一年，330 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Jordan McLaughlin 与马刺达成一年，330 万美元合同
items.summary:
Jordan McLaughlin and the San Antonio Spurs have agreed to a one-year, $3.3 million deal. McLaughlin will be entering his age-30 season and is represented by Greg Lawrence.

McLaughlin appeared in 44 games last season with the Spurs, averaging 2.0 points, 0.7 rebounds and 0.9 assists in 6.4 minutes.

McLaughlin previously spent five seasons with the Minnesota Timberwolves.
